coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. This is the foundation of all cycling fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your future self will thank you for these base miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Easy spin. 85-100 rpm, Seated. Relax and breathe.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep — settle into 120% quickly. Don't overshoot the first 30 seconds.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep of the set. Be patient. Find the groove.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your competition quit 2 reps ago. You're still here. That's the difference.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval: maximize time at >90% VO2max. Breathing should be gasping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is THE rep that makes you faster. The one where most people quit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: this is the exact wattage where people start questioning their life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last set. Empty the tank. You can rest when you're dead. Or in 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-100 rpm. Focus on smooth circles, not stomping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You're not breaking. You're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 8 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where average athletes quit. You're not average. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: target 115%. Breathing should be very labored. If you can talk, go harder.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last set! Everything you have. You'll be cooling down in 65 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: If you can read this, you're not going hard enough. Just kidding. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: High cadence, deep breathing, Seated. This is supposed to hurt.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold effort. This is the rep that builds your aerobic ceiling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This hurts, but you're choosing to be here. That's what separates you.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Focus on form. Seated at 85-100 rpm. Power will follow.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 6. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 7/11. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 7/11 — hold 120% FTP at 85-100 rpm. Seated. 360s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 7 of 11 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 7. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 8 of 11.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 28min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 8 of 11 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 3 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 9. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 31min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 9 of 11 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 9: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 10/11. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 10/11 — hold 115% FTP at 85-100 rpm. Seated. 180s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 10 of 11 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 11. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final rep of this set. Empty the tank — you have 0s recovery coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep. Leave nothing in reserve. You can rest when you're done.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 11. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 50% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.
